functions.name: WarehouseSensorRigSetupPanel
params:
{
  rigs,
  selectedId,
  health,
  loading,
  saving,
  deleting,
  onSelect,
  onRefresh,
  onCalibrate,
  onCreate,
  onDelete,
}

callGraph.callee:
(
    flightId && chunkId
      ? fetchWarehouseLiveChunkBatched(flightId, chunkId, key, url, token, signal)
      : fetchWarehouseLiveChunk(url, token, signal, key)
  ).finally
